name: Pot Roast in Barbecue Sauce
recipeIngredient: 5 lb Beef chuck arm pot roast
recipeInstructions:
1. In a Dutch oven or large pan with a tight-fitting cover, brown the meat in fat. Season with salt and pepper. Remove the meat from the pan and set aside. Pour off the excess fat drippings.
2. Add the remaining ingredients to the pan and mix well.
3. Return the meat to the pan. Cover and simmer for 3 to 3½ hours, or until tender. Alternatively, cook in a preheated oven at 325°F for the same amount of time.
4. Turn the meat once during cooking to ensure even doneness and baste with the sauce.
5. Taste the sauce and adjust seasoning if necessary with salt and pepper.
6. When the meat is cooked through, remove it from the pan and keep warm. Skim any excess fat from the surface of the sauce.
7. Slice the meat and serve the sauce separately.
